arts.ttl: Nicky Butt 'is cautioned by police as ex-Man United star is revealed as the man who headbutted a security guard after being spotted urinating against a wall at his 50th birthday party'
arts.sum: Butt is alleged to have attacked the guard during the event at Soho Farmhouse near Great Tew, Oxfordshire in January.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'at head of queue' for £70m ambipedal attacker
arts.sum: Manchester United are at the head of the queue to sign a highly-rated Bournemouth star in the summer transfer window, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Supercomputer predicts surprise Europa League winner after Man Utd & Tottenham battle through
arts.sum: Manchester United, Tottenham, Athletic Club and Bodo/Glimt will battle it out for a place in the 2024/25 Europa League final.

arts.ttl: Man Utd legend Nicky Butt handed police caution after incident at 50th birthday party
arts.sum: Former Manchester United and England midfielder Nicky Butt had held his 50th birthday party at the trendy Soho Farmhouse in Oxfordshire, where guests included David and Victoria Beckham, Paul Scholes and Gary Neville

arts.ttl: Lyon star Rayan Cherki breaks his silence after Manchester United defeat amid transfer links
arts.sum: The latest Man Utd news following their dramatic Europa League quarter-final second leg win vs Lyon.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand insists Arsenal star would have joined Man Utd 'for the same wages'
arts.sum: Declan Rice has been earning rave reviews for his performances for Arsenal against Real Madrid in the Champions League this week - but Rio Ferdinand insists he could've been in the red shirt of another

arts.ttl: Man Utd Must Unleash ‘Insane’ 17y/o for Debut v Wolves After Amorim Comments
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim must unleash 17y/o Man Utd sensation Bendito Mantato for his debut after what he said following the win over Wolves.

arts.ttl: Man Utd lead Arsenal in race for €80m Rashford replacement
arts.sum: However, Man Utd are expected to face serious competition for Semenyo during the 2025 summer transfer window, with Liverpool set to challenge for his signature, despite the fact that Mohamed Salah has extended his contract with Arne Slot’s side. Man Utd’s pursuit of Semenyo comes following reports that Alejandro Garnacho, Marcus Rashford, Jadon Sancho and Antony could all depart the club on permanent deals this summer.

arts.ttl: Man United already have Europa League semi-final advantage vs Athletic Bilbao
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news and gossip as Ruben Amorim and Co. look ahead to facing Athletic Bilbao in the Europa League semi-final

arts.ttl: Joshua Zirkzee takes pop at Man Utd fans after historic European win
arts.sum: Joshua Zirkzee was watching Man Utd's Europa League win over Lyon from the sidelines after picking up a season-ending injury at Newcastle.
